name: ExtensionEndpoint_EnvironmentType
title: R5: The type of environment(s) exposed at this endpoint (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Endpoint.environmentType` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Endpoint.environmentType` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Endpoint.environmentType` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Endpoint.environmentType` has a context of Endpoint based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Endpoint`.
Element `Endpoint.environmentType` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The type of environment(s) exposed at this endpoint (new)
element.comment:

element.short: The type of environment(s) exposed at this endpoint
element.definition: The type of environment(s) exposed at this endpoint (dev, prod, test, etc.).
